sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَسْرُ الْقَدِيمُ يَعْبُرُ النَّهْرَ الْعَرِيضَ.
sentences.translation: Stari most prelazio je široku rijeku.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient bridge crossed the wide river.

sentences.translation: Gradili su ga radnici od masivnog kamenja.
sentences.translationEn: The workers built it from massive stones.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ وَالْحَيَوَانَاتُ يَعْبُرُونَهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi i životinje prelazili su ga svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: People and animals crossed it every day.

sentences.translation: Most je spajao dva sela koja su bila odvojena.
sentences.translationEn: The bridge connected two villages that were separated.
